parameters.jsCode:
const passed = ($json.newIds || []).map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite);
return [{ json: { passed, ids: passed } }];

parameters.query:
WITH target_ids AS (
  SELECT ARRAY[{{ ($json.passed || []).join(',') || '0' }}]::bigint[] AS ids
), candidate_items AS (
  SELECT i.id, i.source, i.source_id, i.title, i.body, i.post_url, i.link_url,
         i.author, i.sub_or_handle, i.score, i.comment_count, i.published_at,
         i.fetched_at, i.is_ai_relevant, i.entities
    FROM items i
    CROSS JOIN target_ids t
   WHERE i.id = ANY(t.ids)
      OR i.is_ai_relevant IS NULL
      OR (i.is_ai_relevant = TRUE AND i.entities IS NULL)
      OR (
        i.is_ai_relevant = TRUE
        AND i.entities IS NOT NULL
        AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_topics it WHERE it.item_id = i.id)
      )
   ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.id = ANY(t.ids) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
            i.fetched_at DESC
   LIMIT 30
), active_topics AS (
  SELECT id, name, summary, key_entities, item_count, source_count, total_score
    FROM topics
   WHERE archived_at IS NULL
   ORDER BY total_score DESC
   LIMIT 40
)
SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(ci) ORDER BY ci.fetched_at DESC) FROM candidate_items ci), '[]'::jsonb) AS items,
  COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(at) ORDER BY at.total_score DESC) FROM active_topics at), '[]'::jsonb) AS topics;
